title: Bachchan Pandey
subTitle: To succeed in the film industry, Myra chooses Bachchhan Paandey, a notorious hooligan, as the main focus of her new movie. Things get complicated when the gangster decides to act in the film.

title: Raangi
subTitle: Thaiyal Nayagi tries to protect her niece from an online predator. However, things escalate when the FBI's attempt to catch the culprit puts them both in danger as they unwittingly become bait.

title: Encounter Man 2
subTitle: Upon arriving in India to sell his ancestral palace and avoid bankruptcy, a man finds himself in peril when he is kidnapped.

title: The Faith Show
subTitle: Romildo Ribeiro Soares, a Brazilian televangelist, stresses the importance of faith in the Almighty and explains inner life and how to condition it for the world.

title: Enemy
subTitle: Rajiv grows envious of his childhood friend, Chozhan, as he is better than him at most things. The frenemies grow apart only to meet under very different circumstances several years later.

title: Sankranti Ko Aane Vaale Hain
subTitle: Sankranti Ko Aane Vaale Hain

title: Hum Saath Saath Hain
subTitle: Ramkishan and Mamta lead a happy life with their three sons. But when their daughter faces a tragedy, Mamta gets instigated by her close friends, and she embitters her heart towards her stepson Vivek.

title: Dabangg 3
subTitle: Chulbul Pandey, a corrupt police officer, leads a happy life with his wife and family. However, when his past enemy returns to wreak havoc, he must protect his loved ones from harm.

title: Zee Cine Awards 2026
subTitle: An awards night to honor the best talent from Indian film industry for their contribution to Indian cinema, and recognizing notable performers of 2013.

title: Pushpa 2: The Rule
subTitle: Pushpa The Rule Part-02 - 2024 - A smuggling kingpin faces off against a vengeful rival while manipulating politics, making big deals, and navigating tense confrontations. A public apology leads to a dramatic showdown, ending with challenge.

title: Pushpa 2: The Rule
subTitle: Pushpa The Rule Part-02 - 2024 - A smuggling kingpin faces off against a vengeful rival while manipulating politics, making big deals, and navigating tense confrontations. A public apology leads to a dramatic showdown, ending with challenge.

title: Bholaa
subTitle: After getting out of prison with the desire to meet his daughter, Bholaa's plans are interrupted by a well-orchestrated drug bust.

title: Raja Saheb Ka Kamra
subTitle: Seven young contestants take part in a reality TV show. They spend a week inside a haunted house and soon witness paranormal activities around them.

title: Police Power
subTitle: A police officer tries to change his younger brother, who turns to a life of crime, but he fails. He then takes on the local gangster responsible for inciting youngsters towards crime.

title: The Faith Show
subTitle: Romildo Ribeiro Soares, a Brazilian televangelist, stresses the importance of faith in the Almighty and explains inner life and how to condition it for the world.

title: Dhartiputra
subTitle: Yashpal tries to rape Jeeva and her husband, Shiva, stops him while she manages to escape. However, Yashpal kills him and she vows to avenge his death.

title: The Bhootnii
subTitle: After a heartbreak, Shantanu unknowingly summons a spirit named Mohabbat, whose obsessive presence begins to disrupt the peace of the entire college campus.

title: Baaghi
subTitle: Determined to rescue his former love, the ruggedly handsome Ronny confronts his enemies with a flurry of powerful roundhouse kicks and bone-crushing punches.

title: Hum Aapke Hain Kaun
subTitle: A man and a woman fall in love, but fate intervenes when she has to marry his older brother for the good of their families.

title: Sikandar
subTitle: A passionate young man faces off against a corrupted system, challenging the existing authorities and injustice that take away the rights of common people.

title: Baaghi 4
subTitle: Following a failed suicide attempt, a man struggles with reality and descends into turmoil. His family faces uncertainty while a concealed truth lures him into a complex maze of obsession and love.

title: Dabangg
subTitle: Chulbul Pandey, a police officer, battles a corrupt political leader, Cheddi Singh, who strains Chulbul's relationship with his step-brother.

title: Saaho
subTitle: An undercover agent and his partner go after a thief who has stolen 2,000 crore rupees. Soon, they realise that the case is linked to the death of a crime lord and an emerging gang war.

title: Sardaar Gabbar Singh
subTitle: The kingdom of Rathanpur is forced to face the wrath of Bhairav Singh, who unceremoniously usurps their land. They later find respite when Gabbar Singh, a brave policeman, takes on their oppressor.

title: The Faith Show
subTitle: Romildo Ribeiro Soares, a Brazilian televangelist, stresses the importance of faith in the Almighty and explains inner life and how to condition it for the world.

title: Rogue
subTitle: After his lover betrays him, a heartbroken man swears off women forever, but fate intervenes when he has to save a woman from a chasing of gangster.

title: Koi ... Mil Gaya
subTitle: A young man with special needs is influenced by his father's scientific work. He encounters an alien who grants him extraordinary abilities and transforms his life.

title: Ek Deewane Ki Deewaniyat
subTitle: An influential politician and a headstrong megastar's fiery romance fuelled with passion brings absolute chaos, mania and melancholy.

title: RRR
subTitle: A fearless revolutionary and an officer in the British force, who once shared a deep bond, decide to join forces and chart out an inspirational path of freedom against the despotic rulers.
